no_connection_retry: No connection. Please try again later.
rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
save_failed: Couldn't save just now — try again in a moment?
load_failed: Couldn't load just now — try again in a moment?
title: Oops.
boundary_body: We've reported this automatically. Try again — if it keeps happening, go to Profile → Help.
api_not_educational_title: That doesn't look like study material
api_not_educational_body: Try a different photo — a book page works best.
api_rate_limited_body: You're going fast. Try again in a minute.
api_extraction_failed_body: Try again — maybe brighter or closer.
api_evaluation_failed_title: Can't check your answer right now
api_upload_failed_body: Check your connection and try again.
api_forbidden_title: You don't have permission for this
api_not_found_body: It may have already been deleted.
api_internal_body: We've been notified and will look into it.
